auth_notes: Requires a Zillow Web Services ID (ZWSID) for general data. For Premier Agent lead management, it often requires OAuth2 or the Zillow Tech Connect (ZTC) setup which uses a unique endpoint URL for XML POSTs.
rate_limits: Standard ZWSID limits are typically 1,000 calls per day, but Premier Agent partner limits vary based on agreement.
gotchas: Lead delivery via Zillow Tech Connect uses a non-standard XML format that requires manual parsing in n8n.
Many advanced agent features are being migrated to the Bridge Interactive API, which has a different auth structure.
Zillow is restrictive about data scraping and may throttle or block IPs if usage patterns are irregular.
research_notes: The most common n8n use case is lead ingestion. This requires setting up a Webhook node to act as a Zillow Tech Connect endpoint. The workflow must be configured to accept POST requests and use an XML-to-JSON conversion node or a Function node to handle the Zillow-specific XML schema. Outbound requests for property data will use the HTTP Request node with the ZWSID passed as a query parameter.
